title: chelidonium majus var. asiaticum
intro: Chelidonium majus var. asiaticum, also known as Asiatic celandine, is a variety of the greater celandine plant, a flowering perennial native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include its alkaloids, flavonoids, and iridoids, with anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Asiatic celandine include its potential to support liver health, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system, making it a popular herbal remedy for various health issues. Asiatic celandine can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and extracts, which can be used to treat a range of conditions, from digestive issues to skin problems.
